ISSUE_1_VALIDATION_SCORE: 95 - The AI correctly identified that the transaction date is missing from the receipt. According to the compliance rules, "Date of the expense must be clearly visible on the receipt. Invoices must include the date on which the expenditure was made." The receipt only shows an invoice date (2025-05-27) but not the actual transaction date. This is a valid compliance issue that accurately applies the knowledge base.

ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 85 - The AI correctly identified that the expense type description is not clearly visible. While the receipt does show "Go Intense" as a subscription type and mentions telecommunications services, the compliance rules require a clear description of goods/services purchased. The recommendation to address this with the supplier is appropriate. However, the receipt does contain some description of the telecommunications service, so this issue is slightly less severe than presented.

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The AI correctly identified that the purchaser details are not in the name of GoGlobal Europe GmbH as required. The compliance rules explicitly state: "Invoice in the name of the employee or GoGlobal Europe GmbH, Prielmayerstr. 3 80335 Munich Allemagne." The receipt shows the customer name as "Mr. PASCAL CAISSE" but doesn't include the required GoGlobal Europe GmbH details. This is a clear compliance violation.

ISSUE_4_VALIDATION_SCORE: 90 - The AI correctly identified the need for additional documentation to establish business purpose and obtain line manager approval. The compliance rules state: "Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses" and "Employee's line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date." The recommendation to provide itemized expense reports and obtain line manager approval is directly aligned with the knowledge base.
